title: DPT Administration
bodyText:
DAKOTA POKER TOUR
Administration

Integrated administration backed by Supabase staging and production-derived reference data.

Production-derived data
Source: prod_dakotapokertour.sql
Repository: supabase
Snapshot: 7/13/2026, 1:41:27 AM
Staging operations
Authenticated tournament actions write only to Supabase staging. Production remains read-only.

PRODUCTION SQL SNAPSHOT
Production Data Dashboard

This dashboard uses records extracted from the live Dakota Poker Tour production database—not sample or mock records.

PRODUCTION USERS
2,591

Count only; private user rows are not exposed in this preview.

TOURNAMENT ENTRIES
11,019

Historical production tournament-player records.

PRODUCTION TOURNAMENTS
271

261 curated records currently available to the integrated repository.

PRODUCTION EVENTS
82

80 curated records currently available to the integrated repository.

PRODUCTION VENUES
78

78 production-derived venue records available.

PRODUCTION ARTICLES
392

383 production-derived articles available.

INTEGRATED MODULES

NEXT BACKEND MILESTONE
Supabase staging + authentication

The next phase replaces the local production snapshot transport with Supabase staging, adds admin login/roles, and then enables audited writes one module at a time.

No fake records
No production writes
No private user fields in this deployment
Same Next.js/Vercel project as the public site
